title: Barlex
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Barlex |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{SWE|groups|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] ([[Cloning/Legends|clone]]) |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Parjai Squad]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Is it the ''Mando'' thing that's coming between us, dear?''"
"''Just my appreciation of the irony that we're fighting ''Mando'' mercenaries in some places.|Fi and Barlex|''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]''}} '''Barlex''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]], and senior [[Non-commissioned officer/Legends|Non-commissioned officer (NCO)]] of [[Parjai Squad]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. By [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]] he developed a strong dislike for [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] due to several of the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] fighting for the Confederates, and he expressed this to the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of [[Omega Squad]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Couldn't you at least get us matte-black ones? I don't want to plunge to my doom with uncoordinated accessories. People will talk.''"
"''You'll have white, and ''like'' it.|Fi appeals to Barlex for black winged jet packs|}} Barlex was a [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]-bred [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], and served the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]],''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' places the interaction between Barlex and Omega Squad 470 [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], which takes place after the start of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. Given that ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' defines a [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Standard year/Legends|standard year]] as 368 days, the events must therefore occur in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]. [[Gender/Legends|he]] was a [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] and senior [[Non-commissioned officer/Legends|NCO]] of [[Parjai Squad]], part of the [[Clone paratrooper/Legends|paratrooper]] [[2nd Airborne Company/Legends|2nd Airborne Company]]. This [[Company/Legends|company]] was itself a part of the [[212th Attack Battalion/Legends|212th Attack Battalion]] of the [[7th Sky Corps/Legends|7th Sky Corps]].{{Film|III}} En route to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Gaftikar]] before continuing to [[Mirial/Legends|Mirial]] aboard the Republic auxiliary [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Core Conveyor]]'', he met with the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of [[Omega Squad]] in the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]]. He greeted the [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] with a snide remark about their [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|armor]], which was fitted with winged [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]]. The clone Commando [[Fi Skirata|Fi]] almost hit Barlex in the face when he extended his wings, and proceeded to make several attempts at humor. The NCO however was unsmiling, and pointed out to the Mandalorian-trained commandos that members of their adopted culture were often fighting for the Separatists as [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]]. This led to the compartment going quiet before the squad's [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Niner Skirata|Niner]] both subtly and unofficially reprimanded Fi. Barlex then walked off without a word when the Niner suggest they contact their [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Arligan Zey]]. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Nice of you to join us, Omega, and may I be the first to say that you look like a bunch of complete prats?|Barlex greets Omega Squad|}} By the time Barlex met Omega Squad, he had become weary of supporting special forces and had lost ten clone brothers to Mandalorians. Like other members of the 2nd Airborne, this meant he held strong feelings of animosity towards them and their culture. He thus resented Omega Squad due to their adopting the Mandalorian mindset, and made several vindictive comments to the squad. However, he dropped the topic and walked off after a moment when Niner suggested they get in contact with General Zey, with [[Darman Skirata|Darman]] believing the sergeant withheld a final comment. As a clone of Jango, Barlex was also a [[Human/Legends|human]] male and stood at a height of 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. ==Behind the scenes== Barlex appeared in the [[2007]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'', part of the [[Republic Commando|''Republic Commando'' series]] written by [[Karen Traviss]]. In [[2009]], he was later mentioned in the final book in the series ''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' {{Mo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Barlex }} [[Category:Clone trooper sergeants]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Members of the 212th Attack Battalion]]
